Services.title: Our business model
Services.subtitle: Investment + Design + Operations + Marketing. All under one brand.
Services.service1Desc: Professional short-term rental property management. Listing, pricing, 24/7 guest support, cleaning, maintenance, verification and reports.
Services.service2Desc: Purchase, redesign and operation of high-potential properties. We search, negotiate, remodel and integrate your property for short-term rental with hotel standards.
Services.service3Desc: We help you buy or sell smarter, with real profitability analysis. Property selection with potential and support in buying or selling.
Services.service3Plan: 2% + VAT commission — includes 6 months free management
Services.footerText: We are your long-term partner in short-term rentals — from purchase to operations.

Testimonials.title: What our property owners say
Testimonials.subtitle: Real results from owners who trust Mr.BnB to manage their properties.
Testimonials.quote1: We've been with Mr.BnB for 8 months and the income exceeded all our expectations. We went from having an empty apartment to 82% occupancy. The best part is I don't have to worry about anything.
Testimonials.quote2: At first I had doubts about short-term rentals, but the Mr.BnB team gave me confidence. The monthly reports are super detailed and they're always available when I need them.
Testimonials.quote3: I had my apartment on a traditional lease and decided to try Mr.BnB. In the first quarter I was already earning 40% more. The process was incredibly fast, in 10 days I already had my first booking.

ProcesoPage.metaTitle: How It Works - Step by Step Process
ProcesoPage.metaDescription: Learn the step-by-step process to turn your property into a profitable short-term rental asset. In less than 2 weeks your property can start generating income.
ProcesoPage.heroSubtitle: A clear and proven process across 60+ properties to transform your apartment into a profitable short-term rental asset.
ProcesoPage.timelineBadge: Your property can start generating income in less than 2 weeks
ProcesoPage.step1Desc: We analyze your property in detail, its location, direct competition and real income potential in short-term rental. We use data from our portfolio of 60+ properties to give you an accurate projection.
ProcesoPage.step1Detail3: Direct competition study in the area
ProcesoPage.step1Detail4: Income projection based on real data
ProcesoPage.step2Desc: We transform your property to meet hotel standards that guarantee the best experience for guests and the best reviews for you.
ProcesoPage.step2Detail1: Interior design focused on short-term rental
ProcesoPage.step3Desc: We create professional listings on the main booking platforms, optimized for maximum visibility and conversion.
ProcesoPage.step3Detail1: Airbnb listing managed by our Superhost team
ProcesoPage.step4Desc: Once listed, we take care of absolutely everything. You just receive monthly income while we operate with hotel standards.
ProcesoPage.step4Detail2: Dynamic pricing adjusted in real time
ProcesoPage.step4Detail3: Hotel-standard cleaning coordination between each booking
ProcesoPage.step5Desc: Each month you receive a detailed report with your property's results. Full transparency with clear and comparable data.
ProcesoPage.step5Detail1: Gross and net income for the period
ProcesoPage.step5Detail4: Detail of each booking (platform, dates, amount)
ProcesoPage.ctaTitle: In less than 2 weeks, your property can be generating income
ProcesoPage.ctaDesc: No prior experience needed. We take care of everything, from the initial assessment to ongoing operations.
ProcesoPage.faq1Q: How long does the complete process take?
ProcesoPage.faq1A: From the initial assessment to the first booking, the process takes between 10 and 14 business days. If the property is already furnished and equipped, it can be even faster.
ProcesoPage.faq2Q: Do I need to invest in remodeling my property?
ProcesoPage.faq2A: Not necessarily. We evaluate the property and, if it's in good condition, it may only require basic furnishing (linens, amenities). If we recommend improvements, always with a clear ROI analysis.
ProcesoPage.faq3A: We do. We have our own cleaning team, trained with hotel protocols. The cleaning fee is charged directly to the guest.
ProcesoPage.faq4Q: How do I receive my income?
ProcesoPage.faq4A: Each month you receive a transfer with your property's net income, along with a detailed report of all bookings and expenses.
ProcesoPage.faq5Q: Can I see how my property is doing in real time?
ProcesoPage.faq5A: Yes. In addition to the monthly report, you can contact us at any time about occupancy status, upcoming bookings and projections.
ProcesoPage.faq6Q: What happens if a guest damages my property?
ProcesoPage.faq6A: All bookings are covered by the platform's insurance (AirCover on Airbnb, for example). Additionally, we conduct a photographic inventory before and after each stay to document any incidents.
ProcesoPage.faq7Q: Can I use my property some days of the year?
ProcesoPage.faq7A: Absolutely. You can block the dates you need directly with us. We just ask that you let us know as far in advance as possible to optimize the booking calendar.
ProcesoPage.faq8Q: What is the minimum contract duration?
ProcesoPage.faq8A: Our contracts have a minimum duration of 12 months, with automatic renewal. You can cancel with 60 days' notice.
ProcesoPage.faq9A: We provide all the documentation you need for your tax return. Short-term rental income is declared as real estate income. We recommend consulting with your accountant to optimize your tax situation.

FAQPage.metaDescription: We answer your questions about short-term rental property management with Mr.BnB. Commissions, process, timelines, insurance and more.
FAQPage.heroSubtitle: Everything you need to know about our short-term rental management service.
FAQPage.cat1q1A: We handle the complete management of your short-term rental property. This includes listing on platforms (Airbnb, Booking.com), dynamic pricing, 24/7 guest support, cleaning coordination, preventive maintenance, and detailed monthly reports. You just receive the income.
FAQPage.cat1q2Q: How much does Mr.BnB charge for its services?
FAQPage.cat1q2A: Our model is a commission on generated income: 17% + VAT. There are no fixed monthly costs. If your property doesn't generate income, you pay nothing. This aligns our incentives with yours.
FAQPage.cat1q3Q: In which neighborhoods do you operate?
FAQPage.cat1q3A: We currently operate in Providencia, Las Condes, Ñuñoa, Santiago Centro and Vitacura. We are constantly evaluating new areas. If your property is in another neighborhood, contact us anyway for an evaluation.
FAQPage.cat1q4Q: Can I use my apartment some days of the month?
FAQPage.cat1q4A: Yes. You can block the dates you want to use personally through our system. We just ask that you give us reasonable advance notice so as not to affect already confirmed bookings.
FAQPage.cat2q1Q: How long does it take to start receiving bookings?
FAQPage.cat2q1A: From the time you sign with us, the typical process takes between 7 and 15 days: property evaluation, furnishing if needed, professional photography, listing and first bookings. We've had cases of first bookings in less than 10 days.
FAQPage.cat2q2Q: Do I need to furnish or equip my apartment?
FAQPage.cat2q2A: Your property needs to be equipped to receive guests (furniture, linens, kitchenware, amenities). If it's not, we help with the furnishing and interior design process, with trusted suppliers and preferential pricing.
FAQPage.cat2q3A: We coordinate professional cleaning teams with hotel standards between each guest. The cleaning cost is charged to the guest as part of the rate, so it's not an expense for you.
FAQPage.cat2q4A: We use autonomous check-in systems with lockboxes or electronic locks. The guest receives detailed instructions automatically before arrival. You don't need to be present.
FAQPage.cat3q1Q: How much can I earn with short-term rental vs traditional rent?
FAQPage.cat3q1A: On average, our property owners earn 30% more than with traditional rent, and during peak season it can reach +55%. Results depend on location, property type and season. Use our simulator for a personalized estimate.
FAQPage.cat3q2Q: When and how do I receive my income?
FAQPage.cat3q2A: We make monthly settlements. You receive a detailed report with all bookings, income and deductions, along with a bank transfer within the first 10 days of the following month.
FAQPage.cat3q3A: Santiago has moderate seasonality. During low season (July-August) we adjust rates and target longer stays (corporate, relocations, digital nomads) to maintain occupancy above 65%.
FAQPage.cat4q1Q: What happens if a guest damages my property?
FAQPage.cat4q1A: Airbnb offers AirCover, which covers up to USD 3,000,000 in damages. Additionally, we recommend getting supplementary insurance. We document the property's condition before and after each stay.
FAQPage.cat4q2Q: Is there a contract? Can I cancel?
FAQPage.cat4q2A: Yes, we sign a management contract. You can cancel the service with 30 days' notice, honoring already confirmed bookings. There are no penalties for early termination.
FAQPage.cat4q3Q: How do you handle neighbor complaints?
FAQPage.cat4q3A: We have strict protocols: clear house rules, guest verification, occupancy limits, and no-party policies. We maintain proactive communication with building management.
FAQPage.cat4q4Q: Do I need a business license or tax registration?
FAQPage.cat4q4A: Depending on your situation, it may be necessary. We guide you on tax and municipal requirements. Check our blog article on regulations for more details.
FAQPage.ctaDesc: Our team is available to answer any questions. Schedule a no-obligation meeting.
